top_signals.title: China’s Shoppers Are Buying Luxury Again as Stock Market Rebounds
top_signals.summary: Chinese consumers are showing signs of a renewed appetite for high-end beauty and fashion products, a rare bright spot for global luxury brands after years of weak demand and margin-eroding discounts in their most important growth market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Brussels officials head east with tour of Balkan capitals
top_signals.summary: EU-western Balkan summit on expansion of bloc, Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings steps down, Peru goes to the polls
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
